name: Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 2 large cloves of garlic, peeled and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the bread crumbs and milk. Let soak for 10 minutes.
2. In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Cook onion for 3 minutes, then remove from heat and allow to cool.
3. In a large bowl, combine ground meats, soaked bread crumbs, cooked onion, egg, Parmesan, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Shape the mixture into 1 1/2-inch diameter balls and set on a plate.
5. Return the skillet to low heat and add another 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Cook the meatballs in batches until browned on all sides, about 10 minutes per batch.
6. Transfer the browned meatballs to a side plate. Add more oil if necessary and continue cooking remaining meatballs.
7. Add the browned meatballs to the simmering marinara sauce and heat for 10-15 minutes.
8. Serve meatballs and sauce with cooked spaghetti or pasta of choice.
